name: daily-retro
description: Nightly cross-project continuous-improvement retrospective for Claude Code: gathers everything from a day's sessions, runs a 3-lens council, and (optionally) auto-applies the top improvements as skills/CLAUDE.md rules with dedup, recurrence-escalation, and consolidation gates. Scheduler survives rate limits (auto-retry at reset) and resumes interrupted runs step-by-step.
